atoms.semantic_claim: The old divergence propagates the underlying EIP-2718 decode error string into `EthApiError::FailedToDecodeSignedTransaction` when recovering raw transactions.

destinations.evidence: Destination uses `decode_2718_exact(data)` for stricter no-trailing-bytes decoding, but maps errors to the unit `EthApiError::FailedToDecodeSignedTransaction` and therefore drops the source error detail.

atoms.equivalence_argument: Partial: destination improves exact input consumption but does not preserve detailed decode error propagation; the public error-type gap is queued under `file-0384-atom-0001`.
atoms.test_strategy: malformed raw transaction RPC error detail test
atoms.negative_test_candidate: Malformed bytes with a concrete decode error should surface that detail in the RPC invalid params string.
atoms.notes: Do not duplicate review queue entry; this is the call-site counterpart to `file-0384-atom-0001`.

summary: Raw transaction recovery partially maps the old decode path: destination has stricter exact decoding but omits detailed decode error propagation already queued under `file-0384`.
notes: Queue entry verified as file-0391: M	crates/rpc/rpc-eth-types/src/utils.rs.
No new review entry added because the same public error semantic gap is already queued as `file-0384-atom-0001`.
